name: Peanut Butter Crispies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-quart saucepan, combine the brown sugar and corn syrup.
2. Cook over medium heat until the mixture boils and the syrup dissolves.
3. Remove from heat and stir in the peanut butter.
4. Add the crisp rice cereal and stir until it is well coated.
5. Press the mixture evenly into a buttered 13 x 9 x 2-inch pan using a buttered spatula or waxed paper.
6. Allow to cool completely, then cut into 24 squares.
7. (Optional) Attach chocolate candies with peanut butter for garnish.
